INSERT INTO t1 SELECT a, b+10 FROM t1;
    SELECT * FROM log ORDER BY x;
SELECT * FROM log2 ORDER BY x;

SELECT 'a:', x, y FROM log UNION ALL 
          SELECT 'b:', x, y FROM log2 ORDER BY x, y;

INSERT INTO t1(a) VALUES('xyz');
      SELECT * FROM log ORDER BY x;

    SELECT * FROM t5;
